title: IIT Roorkee Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Research Fellow Posts
description: Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Senior Research Fellow Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech, M.E/ M.Tech in Electrical Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, and salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candi...
